Why it works

SEE YOUR WEEK
BEFORE IT HAPPENS

When you have a calendar to follow, you know exactly how much time you do and don't have. It makes you visualise and see gaps you'd never spot when brainstorming in your head — and it ensures you get everything done while still protecting time for yourself. This isn't just planning. It's total clarity on your week.

TIMEBLOCK

BUILD YOUR WEEK

Tell us about your life — we'll handle the rest.

1

Your lifestyle & commitments

Give the AI context about your day-to-day so it can build a schedule that actually fits your life.

✏️ "Details like this will help you have the best schedule built for you" — e.g. "I'm a freelance PT with 6 online clients. I train 5x per week, growing my Instagram and batch content on Tuesdays. Evenings are family time — nothing after 7pm."
2

Your top 5 priorities

List your biggest priorities in order — most important first. These shape your entire week.

P1
P2
P3
P4
P5
3

Your weekly calendar

Tap any empty slot to add a task. Hit "Build with AI" when ready — then drag, tweak, and delete until it's perfect.

P1 — Very important
P2 — Important
P3 — Needs doing
P4 — When possible
P5 — Nice to have
TimeMonTueWedThuFriSatSun
